name: sacred temple
hints: The altar room of the sacred temple. The altar holds secrets. Try praying and examining it.
PRAY at the altar to hear something. EXAMINE ALTAR to find hidden items. Both actions reveal useful things.
PRAY to receive a divine response. EXAM ALTAR to find a hidden item. Go NORTH for the ornate chest room, EAST to return to the staircase.
notes: Altar room in the sacred temple. PRAY reveals a hidden item. EXAMINE ALTAR finds another hidden item. Both are important actions. North leads to the chest room (room 25), east back to the temple entry (room 21).
